nasb.text: He who is slow to anger is better than the mighty, And he who rules his spirit, than he who captures a city.

esv.text: Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city.

cnv.text: 不輕易動怒的，勝過勇士； 克服己心的，勝過把城攻取的人。

ccb.text: 不轻易发怒者胜过勇士， 能自我控制胜过攻陷城池。

csbs.text: 不轻易发怒的，好过勇士； 控制自己心灵的，胜过攻取城池的人。
